headline: Here Are Monday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Adobe, Advanced Micro Devices, CrowdStrike, DoorDash, Fortinet, GE Vernova, Snap, StubHub, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: The futures are trading flat as we get set to start a new trading week, and after last week’s string of record highs, it may be tough to duplicate the stellar performance that Wall Street put on. All of the major indices closed higher, except the Dow Jones Industrials, which finished the ...
